headlines: Voor de vrouw die altijd geeft.
Geen bloemen. Dit zit altijd goed.
Een cadeau met betekenis. Voor haar.
Over tien jaar draagt ze dit nog.

images.description: A beaded bracelet composed of blue and dark round stones, with three silver ornately patterned beads and one square metal charm engraved with the letters "SB," is centered on a light beige surface. In the upper background, pink roses, small white flowers, and a cream satin ribbon are partially visible and soft-focused. Visible text includes "STONEY bracelets" at the top, "Een cadeau met betekenis.", "Voor haar. Van jou.", a button reading "ONTDEK DE COLLECTIE →", and two icon-accompanied labels reading "Natuurlijke stenen" and "Perfect cadeau voor Moederdag" in the lower right. The image is square-format with soft, diffused lighting.

A beaded bracelet composed of blue and black spherical stones with two ornate silver-toned patterned beads and a square metal charm engraved with "SB" is centered on a cream-colored fabric surface. In the background, pink roses, small white flowers, and a beige gift box tied with a satin ribbon are softly out of focus. The text "STONEY bracelets" appears at the top, with Dutch-language text below reading "Een cadeau met betekenis.", "Voor haar. Van jou.", a sage-green button reading "ONTDEK DE COLLECTIE →", and two icon-accompanied labels: "Perfect cadeau voor Moederdag" and "Natuurlijke stenen."
